title: Timeouts creating new rows
excerpt: I have several apps I have written in C# that create new boards and rows. After I created between 70 and 90 rows I get server timeout error.  I’ve tried increasing the timeout value in my service talking to your server a…

posts.author: jwalton49 (Jack Walton)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have several apps I have written in C# that create new boards and rows. After I created between 70 and 90 rows I get server timeout error. I’ve tried increasing the timeout value in my service talking to your server and it times out well before my timeout is reached. Can someone help with this? It is not that much data. The actual error is ’ The response from https://api.monday.com/v2/ was GatewayTimeout’
Thanks.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @jwalton49 and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

Which query is the one that is failing?

If you want to us to continue this via email, we can also do that at appsupport@monday.com

Looking forward to hearing from you

Cheers,
Matias
